messages.content:
Can I give you some code in c++ and the errors associated w/ them. Could you tell me whats wrong.
6 C++ files, three .h or Header files and three .cpp or Source Code files. These are;

Main.cpp
Roster.cpp
Roster.h
Student.cpp
Student.h
Degree.h

Of course! If you provide the C++ code for the files and the error messages you're seeing when you attempt to compile the program, I'll do my best to help you identify the issues and offer solutions. Please make sure to include relevant portions of the code and exact error messages for accurate assistance.

Thank you for providing the source files. Let's proceed to the error messages you're encountering. Please provide the exact compilation errors, and I will analyze them to determine what's wrong with the code.

Remember, error messages from a compiler are very specific and can help pinpoint exactly where the problem is in the source code. If possible, provide the error messages verbatim, as this will help in giving you the most accurate assistance.

After implementing the correction you provided:private:
    static constexpr size_t rosterSize = 5;
    std::array<std::unique_ptr<Student>, rosterSize> classRosterArray;
    int lastIndex = -1;
}; // <- Add this semi-colon

Yes, it would be helpful to see the updated `.h` and `.cpp` code files after you've made the changes. This way, I can review your latest code and provide more accurate guidance on fixing any remaining issues or ensuring proper syntax and structure.

Please provide the updated `Roster.h`, `Roster.cpp`, and any other files where you have made changes that could be related to the error messages you're seeing. Include the entire content of the files or the most relevant sections, especially around the areas where the errors are pointed out by your previous error messages.

Once you've posted the updated code, I can take a closer look to help you further.
